stemHtml: The track-line on the Electronic Horizontal Situation Indicator (EHSI) or Navigation Display (ND) of an Electronic Flight Instrument System (EFIS)…

options.a: indicates that the pilot has made a manual track selection.
options.b: represents the track of the aircraft over the ground. When it coincides with the desired track, wind influence is compensated for.
options.c: corresponds to the calculated IRS TH and is correct during turns.
options.d: indicates to the pilot that a manually selected heading is being flown.
